metadata.description: Multi-model brainstorming skills for Claude Code. Run Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, or both in parallel against your real codebase, then synthesize findings with Claude's own review for high-confidence, grounded critiques.

plugins.name: multi-model-brainstorm
plugins.description: Run Codex and/or Gemini CLI brainstorming sessions against your codebase for multi-perspective plan review, design critique, and idea generation
